Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given two logs Log A System A and Log B System B Our goal is to merge them into a single event log by matching events that represent the same activity and to handle events that are only in one log

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We will use a small timestamp tolerance eg 2 seconds for matching events by time and order id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each event in Log A we will look for a matching event in Log B if any and merge them If no match we keep the event from Log A and mark it as from System A only Similarly events in Log B that are not matched with any in Log A will be included as from System B only

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We will use the timestamp from Log A as the primary timestamp when available since its primary but if an event is only in Log B we use its timestamp For merged events we will choose the Log A timestamp as primary and include the Log B timestamp as an additional attribute for merged events

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For event naming We will use the event type from Log A as the primary event name but also include the event name from Log B as an additional attribute for merged events For non merged events we use the event name from the system it came from

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Lets parse the logs Log A events Log B events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log A event 0 Order Received at 2023 10 10T10 00 00Z Look in Log B for events with order id Order1234 and timestamp within 2 seconds of 10 00 00Z Log B event 0 09 59 58Z difference is 2 seconds which is within tolerance So we match

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log A event 1 Order Validated at 10 01 30Z Log B event 1 10 01 29Z difference is 1 second match

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log A event 2 Payment Processed at 10 02 00Z Log B event 2 10 02 05Z difference is 5 seconds not within 2 seconds So we do not match

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The requirement says if timestamps differ by less than 2 seconds consider them the same event So we use 2 seconds

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log A event 3 Item Shipped at 10 05 00Z Log B event 4 Shipping at 10 05 02Z difference is 2 seconds match

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log A event 4 Item Delivered at 10 20 00Z There is no corresponding event in Log B So we leave it as from Log A only

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log B event 3 Quality Check at 10 03 00Z no match in Log A So we include it as from Log B only Also Log B event 2 PaymentCheck was not matched so we include it as from Log B only

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Alternatively we can add a field source to indicate the source or sources of the event For merged events we can say A and B for Log A only A for Log B only B

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For missing attributes in one of the logs we will include all attributes that appear in either log and set missing ones to null

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we have two additional events from Log B PaymentCheck and Quality Check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Sort by the primary timestamp the events in order are 10 00 00Z 10 01 30Z 10 02 00Z 10 02 05Z 10 03 00Z 10 05 00Z 10 20 00Z

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Merged events Order Received and OrderReceived timestamps differ by 2 seconds merged Order Validated and OrderValidation timestamps differ by 1 second merged Item Shipped and Shipping timestamps differ by 2 seconds merged Not merged Payment Processed and PaymentCheck timestamps differ by 5 seconds exceeds tolerance Quality Check no corresponding event in Log A Item Delivered no corresponding event in Log B
